message:
Add series_map conformance coverage (FP-P2D-124)

- SeriesMap enum variant with execution/diff handlers
- Three fixtures: basic_strict, unmapped_nan_strict, empty_hardened
- Reuses replace_to_find/replace_to_value fields; unmapped values become NaN

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
